examples: There was an inevitability about their defeat.
There is a certain inevitability that ebook sales have now overtaken paperback sales on Amazon's US site.
Popularly, one refers cynically to "human nature" in accepting the inevitability of such undesirable human behavior as greed, murder, cheating and lying.
While Bezos does not see physical books disappearing anytime soon, he sees a certain inevitability to their eclipse.
These men pooh-pooh the notion that there was anything approaching inevitability as to how events unfolded.
